## Ingress v1beta1 → v1 Migration Files

The migration spans several layers in `kubernetes/kubernetes`:

### Conversion Functions
- **`pkg/apis/networking/v1beta1/conversion.go`** — Hand-written conversion for `IngressBackend` (maps `ServiceName`/`ServicePort` → `IngressServiceBackend`) and `IngressSpec` (maps `Backend` → `DefaultBackend`)
- **`pkg/apis/networking/v1beta1/zz_generated.conversion.go`** — Generated conversions for `Ingress`, `HTTPIngressPath` (including `PathType` pointer casting), `IngressClass`, etc.
- **`pkg/apis/networking/v1/zz_generated.conversion.go`** — Generated v1 ↔ internal conversions for `Ingress`, `HTTPIngressPath`, `IngressBackend`, `IngressClass`
- **`pkg/apis/extensions/v1beta1/conversion.go`** — Same hand-written conversion logic for the older `extensions/v1beta1` Ingress API
- **`pkg/apis/extensions/v1beta1/zz_generated.conversion.go`** — Generated conversions for extensions/v1beta1

### Validation (PathType became required)
- **`pkg/apis/networking/validation/validation.go`** — `IngressValidationOptions` struct for beta→GA transitions, `ValidateIngressCreate`/`Update`, `validateHTTPIngressPath` (enforces `PathType != nil`)

### Defaulting (PathType defaulted in v1beta1)
- **`pkg/apis/networking/v1beta1/defaults.go`** — `SetDefaults_HTTPIngressPath` defaults `PathType` to `ImplementationSpecific`
- **`pkg/apis/extensions/v1beta1/defaults.go`** — Same for extensions/v1beta1

### Storage/Registry
- **`pkg/registry/networking/ingress/storage/storage.go`** — `NewREST` wires up Ingress storage
- **`pkg/registry/networking/ingress/strategy.go`** — `ingressStrategy`/`ingressStatusStrategy`

  "text": "The Ingress v1beta1 to v1 migration in kubernetes/kubernetes spans several layers:\n\n1. **Conversion functions** (v1beta1 <-> internal networking type):\n   - `pkg/apis/networking/v1beta1/conversion.go`: Hand-written conversion functions for IngressBackend (maps old ServiceName/ServicePort fields to new IngressServiceBackend) and IngressSpec (maps old Backend field to DefaultBackend). These handle the structural differences between v1beta1 and the internal type.\n   - `pkg/apis/networking/v1beta1/zz_generated.conversion.go`: Generated conversion functions for Ingress, IngressList, IngressClass, IngressBackend, HTTPIngressPath (including PathType pointer conversion), IngressLoadBalancerStatus, etc.\n   - `pkg/apis/networking/v1/zz_generated.conversion.go`: Generated conversion functions for the v1 <-> internal type, including Ingress, HTTPIngressPath, IngressBackend, IngressClass, etc.\n   - `pkg/apis/extensions/v1beta1/conversion.go`: Hand-written conversion functions for the extensions/v1beta1 Ingress (which predates networking/v1beta1), with the same ServiceName/ServicePort -> IngressServiceBackend mapping.\n   - `pkg/apis/extensions/v1beta1/zz_generated.conversion.go`: Generated conversion functions for extensions/v1beta1 Ingress types including HTTPIngressPath, IngressLoadBalancerStatus, etc.\n\n2. **Validation changes** (PathType became required in v1):\n   - `pkg/apis/networking/validation/validation.go`: Contains `IngressValidationOptions` struct (with `AllowInvalidSecretName` and `AllowInvalidWildcardHostRule` for beta-to-GA transitions), `ValidateIngressCreate`, `ValidateIngressUpdate`, `validateHTTPIngressPath` (enforces PathType is non-nil), `ValidateIngressSpec`, `ValidateIngressStatusUpdate`, `allowInvalidSecretName`, `allowInvalidWildcardHostRule`. The `validateHTTPIngressPath` function requires PathType to be set.\n\n3. **Defaulting** (PathType defaulted in v1beta1):\n   - `pkg/apis/networking/v1beta1/defaults.go`: `SetDefaults_HTTPIngressPath` defaults PathType to `PathTypeImplementationSpecific` when nil (allowing existing v1beta1 objects without PathType to be valid).\n   - `pkg/apis/extensions/v1beta1/defaults.go`: Same defaulting for extensions/v1beta1 `HTTPIngressPath`.\n\n4. **Storage and registry**:\n   - `pkg/registry/networking/ingress/storage/storage.go`: `NewREST` wires up the Ingress REST storage (uses networking internal type as storage version, served as networking/v1 GA).\n   - `pkg/registry/networking/ingress/strategy.go`: `ingressStrategy` and `ingressStatusStrategy` implement create/update preparation, validation delegation, and status management.\n\n5. **Type definitions**:\n   - `pkg/apis/networking/types.go`: Internal Ingress type with PathType as required field.\n   - `staging/src/k8s.io/api/networking/v1/types.go`: Public v1 Ingress types.\n   - `staging/src/k8s.io/api/networking/v1beta1/types.go`: Public v1beta1 Ingress types (PathType optional).\n   - `staging/src/k8s.io/api/extensions/v1beta1/types.go`: Original extensions/v1beta1 Ingress types.\n\n6. **Fuzzer**:\n   - `pkg/apis/networking/fuzzer/fuzzer.go`: Fuzzes `HTTPIngressPath.PathType` with valid values for round-trip testing."
